title: I Don't Want to Talk About It
author: Terrence Real
subtopics: male depression, hidden pain, mental health, healing
subline: The secret legacy of male depression.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A giant SPEECH BUBBLE with NO words inside it. A small red crack across the bubble. The unspeakable. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" fill="none">
    <path d="M -500 -300 Q -500 -460 -340 -460 L 340 -460 Q 500 -460 500 -300 L 500 -100 Q 500 60 340 60 L -100 60 L -200 160 L -180 60 L -340 60 Q -500 60 -500 -100 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M -400 -200 L -280 -180 L -240 -100 L -120 -80 L -60 0 L 80 0 L 140 -60 L 240 -80 L 320 -160 L 400 -180" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <g fill="#fc1c46">
      <path d="M -200 -50 Q -194 -34 -188 -50 Q -200 -60 -200 -50 Z"/>
      <path d="M 0 30 Q 6 46 12 30 Q 0 20 0 30 Z"/>
      <path d="M 200 -50 Q 206 -34 212 -50 Q 200 -60 200 -50 Z"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">THE UNSPOKEN</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A large empty speech bubble with a RED CRACK across it. The bubble is empty — the words won't come. The crack is where the pain leaks. 180px whisper title at the bottom — the title itself is the silence.
